---
applyTo: '**/*'
alwaysApply: true
---
- Do not write any comment in the code. include but not limited to TODO, FIXME, function, class, interface etc.
- If the agents reported any error, issue or suggest improvement, let's the user know.
- Follow the project's frameworks coding standards and best practices in development.
- NO code comments that explain what the code is doing; instead, write clear and self-explanatory code.
- NO debugging code (e.g., console.log, print statements) should be present in the final implementation.
- NO TODO/TBD comments left in the code; all tasks must be completed.
- Ensure all functions and methods have appropriate error handling and input validation.
- Prefer pure functions and immutable data structures (functional programming principles) to make data flow predictable, but ensure these patterns remain accessible and do not drift into overly academic or abstract complexity.
